ErrorEntries.description: A list with error details about the analysis of each source database.

LsaAnalysisId.description: The ID of the LSA analysis run.

Status.description: The status of the LSA analysis, for example COMPLETED.

Result.description: A string that indicates how many event subscriptions were migrated and how many remain to be migrated.

ResourcePendingMaintenanceActions.description: The DMS resource that the pending maintenance action will be applied to.

Request.description: Provides information about a schema conversion action.
Provides information about a schema conversion action.

ReplicationTaskAssessmentRun.description: The ReplicationTaskAssessmentRun object for the canceled assessment run.

CollectorReferencedId.description: The unique ID of the new Fleet Advisor collector, for example: 22fda70c-40d5-4acf-b233-a495bd8eb7f5

CollectorName.description: The name of the new Fleet Advisor collector.

Description.description: A summary description of the Fleet Advisor collector.

ServiceAccessRoleArn.description: The IAM role that grants permissions to access the specified Amazon S3 bucket.

S3BucketName.description: The Amazon S3 bucket that the collector uses to store inventory metadata.

ReplicationConfig.description: Configuration parameters returned from the DMS Serverless replication after it is created.

ReplicationSubnetGroup.description: The replication subnet group that was created.

DatabaseIds.description: The IDs of the databases that the operation deleted.

ReplicationConfig.description: Configuration parameters returned for the DMS Serverless replication after it is deleted.

ReplicationTaskAssessmentRun.description: The ReplicationTaskAssessmentRun object for the deleted assessment run.

PdfReport.description: The Amazon S3 details for an assessment exported in PDF format.

CsvReport.description: The Amazon S3 details for an assessment exported in CSV format.

MigrationProjectIdentifier.description: The name or Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the modified configuration.

ReplicationConfig.description: Information about the serverless replication config that was modified.

ReplicationInstance.description: The replication instance that is being rebooted.

ReplicationConfigArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name of the replication config for which to reload tables.

ReplicationTaskArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the replication task.

RequestIdentifier.description: The identifier for the metadata model creation operation.

ReplicationTaskAssessmentRun.description: The premigration assessment run that was started.
